name: chart-bar-demo-tooltip
visual_summary: A chart bar demonstration with a tooltip provides a way to visualize and compare data points, ideal for dashboard applications where users need to understand complex information at a glance.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-bar-demo-tooltip
Description: A chart bar demonstration with a tooltip provides a way to visualize and compare data points, ideal for dashboard applications where users need to understand complex information at a glance.
Style: modern, responsive
Interactions: animated, hover
Tags: chart, bar, comparison, tooltip, dashboard, data

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
